step_rationale: Neutrophil-recruiting chemokine; LV dilation marker indicates plaque inflammation and injury response.
mechanism: Neutrophil-recruiting chemokine amplifying acute plaque inflammation and post-MI remodeling.

references.title: Identifying the molecular and cellular signature of cardiac dilation following myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Biochimica et biophysica acta. Molecular basis of disease
